generation.style: Amadis-style tactical JRPG battle animation, polished fantasy 2D sprite feel

prompts.master: full body hero, A-pose, front view, transparent or plain background, same face, same armor, same sword, consistent proportions
prompts.idle: subtle breathing idle loop, fantasy warrior, same costume, transparent background
prompts.run: side-facing tactical run cycle, fantasy warrior, same costume, transparent background
prompts.hit: brief recoil hit reaction, fantasy warrior, same costume, transparent background
prompts.death: falling defeat sequence, fantasy warrior, same costume, transparent background
prompts.attackFx: bright sword slash arc, alpha background, fantasy hit effect
